findings: The regime router successfully suppressed hostile regimes and reduced trading to RECOVERY_BOUNCE only.
The routed basket produced 14 trades, weighted net 0.150406, win rate 0.571, and max drawdown -0.027512.
Robustness failed because the best symbol FCEL contributed 0.151098; ex-best-symbol net was -0.000692.
Benchmark-relative interpretation failed versus both SPY and IWM during the Norgate trial window.
The router is useful as risk control, but this trial does not prove a standalone alpha engine.
